settings.exitSessionDesc: Ready to step out of the illusion? You can sign back in at any time.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: The following actions are destructive and cannot be undone. Be careful.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: This action is irreversible. All your posts, whispers, reacts, and your profile metadata will be erased forever.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This illusion is final. Everything linked to your account will vanish from the genjutsu.
settings.languageDesc: Select your preferred language for the illusion.

about.title: The Art of Illusions
about.subtitle: genjutsu (幻術) — Everything vanishes.
about.quote: "Digital permanence is an illusion. We've just made it official."
about.intro1: Genjutsu is a social platform built for developers who value
about.intro2: . In a world where every digital footprint is tracked and archived forever, we offer a sanctuary of transience. Whether it's a code snippet, a tech rant, or a late-night whisper, it lives vividly for 24 hours and then disappears—leaving no trace.
about.feat1Desc: Every post, comment, and interaction has a strictly enforced 24-hour timer. True deletes — not just hidden from UI.
about.feat2Desc: Optimized for sharing code snippets and technical insights. Post freely without worrying about your permanent record.
about.feat3Desc: A clean, high-contrast visual style inspired by Japanese manga. Bold. Minimal. Animated with Framer Motion.
about.feat4Desc: Instant engagement powered by Supabase. Pure chronological connection. The feed resets every morning.
about.feat5Desc: One-tap OAuth via Google or GitHub. Built on Supabase with Row Level Security. Authenticated effortlessly.
about.feat6Desc: No clout chasing, no permanent history. Start every day with a clean slate.
about.feat7Desc: Challenge friends to online multiplayer games — Chess, Tic-Tac-Toe, Rock Paper Scissors, and more. All live, all inside the platform.
about.feat8Desc: Ephemeral direct messages that also vanish after 24 hours. Say what you mean. Leave no paper trail.
about.feat9Desc: Auto-generated open graph images for better social sharing across platforms.
about.feat10Desc: Experience genjutsu as a native Android app. Fast, immersive, and built with Trusted Web Activity technology.
about.feat11Desc: A built-in space to report bugs, suggest features, talk about the app, or just connect. Admins are always there. Say anything, anytime.
about.feat12Desc: Meet fellow developers securely and entirely anonymously via real-time WebSockets. A judgment-free zone to converse.
about.section2Desc: We don't sell your data because we don't keep it. Our systems are designed to purge everything after the 24-hour mark, ensuring your past doesn't define your presence in the community.
about.supportTitle: buy the developer a tea/ coffee to support this project
about.supportDesc: this project is open source, so it's non profit, we don't run ads because it may ruin user experience, support the developer by buying a tea or coffee
about.osDesc: Built for the developer community. Fix a bug, suggest a feature, or help with the manga-inspired design. Every migration, RLS policy, and cron job is in the repo. Let's build something ephemeral together.
